nodes.label: Like Filled / Thumbs Up Active State Icon
nodes.norm_label: like filled / thumbs up active state icon

nodes.label: Private/Protected Route Pattern
nodes.contributor: rationale: Protects authenticated pages by checking auth state (auth?.user) before rendering children; redirects to /login otherwise. All providers should wrap PrivateRoutes.

nodes.label: AuthContext and AuthContextType
nodes.contributor: rationale: createContext must be typed with AuthContextType|null so TypeScript can enforce correct property access (authToken, user) across all consumers.

nodes.label: Token Storage Strategy (Access + Refresh Token)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Best practice is access token in memory (React state/Zustand) and refresh token in HttpOnly cookie. localStorage is convenient for learning but vulnerable to XSS.

nodes.label: Axios Interceptor for JWT Auto-Refresh (useAxios hook)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Request interceptor attaches Bearer token; response interceptor catches 401 errors, calls refresh-token endpoint, updates auth state, and retries original request — keeping user logged in across page sessions.
nodes.norm_label: axios interceptor for jwt auto-refresh (useaxios hook)

nodes.label: Lazy Initializer Function for useState
nodes.contributor: rationale: Pass a function to useState instead of a value to defer expensive one-time computations (e.g., JSON.parse from localStorage) until first mount, avoiding repeated cost on re-renders.

nodes.label: Profile State Pattern: Reducer + Context + Hook
nodes.contributor: rationale: Auth context should only store authentication data. Profile data belongs in a separate ProfileContext + ProfileReducer pipeline: actions => reducers => context => providers => hooks.
nodes.norm_label: profile state pattern: reducer + context + hook

nodes.label: File Upload via useRef (Custom Button Trigger)
nodes.contributor: rationale: File inputs cannot be controlled with useState for security reasons; useRef gives direct DOM access to trigger the file picker and read selected files. FormData is required for multipart/form-data when sending files alongside text.
nodes.norm_label: file upload via useref (custom button trigger)

nodes.label: Like Feature via POST_LIKED Reducer Action
nodes.contributor: rationale: Local useState for likes causes sync issues when a post appears in multiple places. Using a shared reducer (POST_LIKED) ensures all components rendering the same post reflect the same like state. PATCH request is used because only partial data changes.
nodes.norm_label: like feature via post_liked reducer action

nodes.label: Comment Submit via Enter Key (onKeyDown)
nodes.contributor: rationale: When no submit button is present, use onKeyDown with keyCode===13 to submit comment data to the API via PATCH request.

nodes.label: Post Creation via Reducer (POST_CREATED action)
nodes.contributor: rationale: New posts are prepended to the posts array in the reducer ([action.data, ...state.posts]) so newest content appears first without additional sorting.

nodes.label: Delete Comment Feature (POST_COMMENT_DELETED action)
nodes.contributor: rationale: Only show delete button when comment.author.id === auth.user.id. Dispatch POST_COMMENT_DELETED after successful API DELETE to filter comment from the shared posts state.

nodes.label: useDebugValue Performance Optimization
nodes.contributor: rationale: useDebugValue is purely for React DevTools visibility. The formatter function (second argument) runs lazily — only when DevTools is open — avoiding unnecessary computation on every render.
